description:
A time tracker and timesheet app that lets you track work hours across projects.


- Multiline description UI issues (fix)
- Semicolon with new row in description by merging tracking items
- A regular user can continue the time entry with done task (fix)
- A three-digit value cannot be entered as the hour value when editing the duration of a time entry (fix)
- Manual mode issues when Force timer is ON (fix)
